purpose: Defines the first small source-sprite pilot batch before producing all 180 source prompts.
rules: Generate this pilot before the full source batch.
Pilot uses T2 light because it is close to the current base-body skin tone and reveals both highlight and shadow placement.
Pilot uses attack_hit because it is the damage-window frame and the hardest attachment/axis frame to approve.
Do not generate pixel outputs until pilot source frames pass metadata QA and anchor review.
